name: Threat Feed Correlation
description: Advanced threat feed correlation playbook that performs AI-powered IOC analysis against threat intelligence feeds to identify APT campaign matches. When campaign matches are found, the playbook automatically blocks matched indicators on the firewall, initiates endpoint-wide IOC scans via EDR, generates an executive threat briefing with ATT&CK mapping, and distributes it to the SOC team. Unmatched alerts are annotated and placed in monitoring status.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: VirusTotal
required_integrations.reason: Correlate indicators against VirusTotal threat intelligence for campaign attribution

required_integrations.name: CrowdStrike Falcon
required_integrations.reason: Scan all endpoints for related IOCs when APT campaign match is confirmed

required_integrations.name: Jira
required_integrations.reason: Create threat tracking tickets for confirmed campaign matches

config.description: Triggers when a threat feed match or threat intel indicator alert is ingested

config.additional_instructions: Analyze all indicators in the alert against known threat feeds. Identify any matches to known APT campaigns, threat groups, or active operations.
config.description: AI-powered initial correlation of alert indicators against threat intelligence to identify campaign associations

config.code:
analysis = inputs.get('analysis', {})
matched_indicators = analysis.get('matched_indicators', [])
campaign_match = analysis.get('campaign_match', False)
campaign_name = analysis.get('campaign_name', 'Unknown')
confidence = analysis.get('confidence', 0)

ips = [i for i in matched_indicators if i.get('type') == 'ip']
domains = [i for i in matched_indicators if i.get('type') == 'domain']
hashes = [i for i in matched_indicators if i.get('type') == 'hash']

result = {
    'matched_indicators': matched_indicators,
    'total_matched': len(matched_indicators),
    'campaign_match': campaign_match or confidence >= 70,
    'campaign_name': campaign_name,
    'confidence': confidence,
    'ips': ips,
    'domains': domains,
    'hashes': hashes,
    'block_list': [i['value'] for i in matched_indicators]
}
config.description: Extracts matched indicators from the AI correlation analysis and categorizes them by type for downstream actions
Routes based on whether the correlated indicators match a known APT campaign or threat group operation
Blocks all matched indicators on the firewall to prevent communication with threat infrastructure
Initiates an endpoint-wide IOC sweep via CrowdStrike EDR to detect any endpoints communicating with matched threat infrastructure

config.additional_instructions: Generate threat briefing with ATT&CK mapping and recommended defensive actions. Include campaign attribution, indicator details, and tactical recommendations for the SOC team.
config.description: AI-generated executive threat briefing with MITRE ATT&CK technique mapping and recommended defensive actions

notify.subject: THREAT BRIEFING: {{code_1.outputs.result.campaign_name}} Campaign Detected

config.description: Distributes the AI-generated threat briefing to the SOC team via email with campaign details and actions taken

create_ticket.title: Threat Campaign: {{code_1.outputs.result.campaign_name}} — {{code_1.outputs.result.total_matched}} IOCs

config.description: Creates a Jira ticket to track the threat campaign investigation and response for SOC Tier 3
Adds a note documenting that no campaign match was found and individual IOC handling is recommended
Places the alert in monitoring status for continued observation when no campaign match is confirmed
